title: gladiolus imbricatus subsp. pauciflorus
intro: Gladiolus imbricatus subsp. pauciflorus, also known as the lesser sword lily or minor sword lily, is a subspecies of the gladiolus imbricatus plant, which belongs to the Iridaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including the treatment of various health issues due to its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Gladiolus imbricatus subsp. pauciflorus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The plant is typically harvested, dried, and used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
